name: snapshot_review
desc: Review pending parameter changes before applying. Shows a summary of all proposed changes, grouped by agent, parameter name, or element. Use after snapshot_write, before snapshot_apply.

parameters.name: group_by
parameters.description: Group results by: 'agent_id', 'param_name', 'element_id', or omit for full list

parameters.name: clear
parameters.description: Set to 'true' to clear all pending changes. Set to a status value ('pending','failed') to clear only that status.
